Bookings

Group bookings made effortless.

Coach, location, level, price, package. Chosen in a few taps, and your trainees book in seconds. Here's the whole flow.

  • Pick a session

    Group programmes filtered by sport, level and price.

  • See the details

    Coach, dates, location and spaces left, at a glance.

  • Confirm & pay

    Live slots secured in seconds with a saved card.

  • Booked instantly

    Receipt sent and calendar updated, right away.

Questions

Simple answers.

Most academies are live within a week. We import your sessions, schedule and members for you.

The app is the best experience, but anyone can book and pay through a web link too.

Yes. Card, direct debit, recurring and cash, all receipted in the app.

No setup fee, no contract. From just £1 per active user per month. Cancel anytime.

Yes. We migrate your members and schedules for you, and your data stays exportable.
